src/main/java/SmartHome/controller/AddSe.general_idea: Consolidate individual import statements into wildcard imports for cleaner code.
Rename the Catalogue dependency to CatalogueSensors to reflect its specific domain responsibility.
Add a new field to cache the mapping between DeviceDTO and Device instances.
Replace the old RoomMapper utility with a new RoomAssembler class for domain-to-DTO conversion.
Change getDevicesFromRoom to return a list of DeviceDTOs instead of raw Device objects.
Implement DeviceDTO mapping using a new DeviceAssembler class within getDevicesFromRoom.
Update addSensorToDevice to accept DeviceDTO and return SensorDTO instead of raw domain objects.

src/main/java/SmartHome/controller/AddSe.general_idea: Inject a SensorFactory into the addSensorToDevice method to handle sensor creation.
Convert the created Sensor domain object to SensorDTO using SensorAssembler before returning.

Removed import for LocationMapper as it is no longer used.

src/main/java/SmartHome/controller/Defin.general_idea: Replaced LocationMapper.Domain2DTO with LocationAssembler.domain2DTO for DTO conversion.

Renamed field _strName to _name and removed final modifier to allow encapsulation via setter.
Added boolean _status field to track device activation state.
Added UUID _deviceId field to uniquely identify each device instance.
Refactored constructor to use IllegalArgumentException and delegate validation to a private setter method.

src/main/java/SmartHome/domain/Device.ja.general_idea: Added getter methods for name, status, and deviceId to expose private fields.
Added getDeviceFunctionalities method to retrieve descriptions of all attached sensors.

Added toString method to provide a string representation of the Device object.

Replace direct instantiation of Room with a call to the injected RoomFactory.

src/main/java/SmartHome/domain/Location..general_idea: Expand constructor to accept all necessary data for creating composite objects via factories.

src/main/java/SmartHome/domain/Location..general_idea: Delegate validation responsibility to the factory classes instead of handling it in the domain object.

Add a UUID field to store a unique identifier for each Room instance.
Generate a random UUID for the room in the constructor.
Provide a getter method to access the room's unique identifier.
Replace primitive dimension fields with a Dimensions object created via a factory pattern.
Update constructor to accept DimensionsFactory and use it to initialize dimensions.
Add a getter to retrieve the Dimensions object instead of individual primitive values.
Remove individual getters for length, width, and height as they are now encapsulated in Dimensions.

Extract validation logic into separate private methods setName and setDimension for cleaner constructor.

Removed the postalCode field as it is no longer part of the DTO structure.
Added a new _gps field to store GPS location data.

Removed constructor assignment for the deleted postalCode field.
